summary: E2E tested Friend-Recommendations widget + OPDS catalog (backend + frontend). All 22 backend pytest cases pass against the live preview. Frontend: FriendRecsCard renders on Dashboard, /library/recommendations page lists/dismisses/restores recs, Account CatalogSyncCard generates password, exposes URL, toggle works, regenerate confirm() dialog handled.
critical_code_review_comments: opds.py /opds/authors $ne filter uses two $ne values (line 429) — Mongo treats subsequent $ne as overwrite. Only the second ($ne: "") applies. Authors with null could still appear. Recommend using $nin: [null, ""] or {$exists:true,$ne:""} with null guard.

recommendations.py _book_keys returns multiple keys per book, but _primary_rec_key returns only the first URL. If friends have the same book under different fanfic_urls (e.g. one has source_url, another has fanfic_urls[0]), they could fail to collapse into one rec — falls back to title+author only if no URL exists. Working as designed but worth noting.
CatalogSyncCard regenerate uses window.confirm() — works but blocks SSR/tests; consider a styled modal in future. The reviewer agent successfully handled it via page.on('dialog').
FriendRecsCard returns null on initial loading (line 42) — good UX, no flash. Also auto-hides correctly when recs.length === 0 — verified.
test_credentials: Seeded ephemeral users via /tmp/seed_for_ui.py (alice with Bob friend + 2 finished books). Cleaned after test.
seed_data_creation: Seeded 2 test users + 1 friendship + 2 books for UI test; all cleaned afterwards. Pytest fixtures handle their own seed/teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 22 backend tests (7 recommendations + 15 OPDS) pass live. UI verified end-to-end: FriendRecsCard on /library, RecommendationsPage dismiss/undismiss, CatalogSyncCard generate/regenerate/toggle/help. data-testid coverage is complete: friend-recs-card, recs-see-all, recommendations-page, recs-list, rec-row-*, rec-hide-*, toggle-dismissed, restore-*, opds-card, opds-generate-btn, opds-password, opds-url, opds-toggle, opds-regen-btn, opds-help-toggle, opds-help. Storage path /app/uploads/{user_id}/{book_id}.epub|.cover confirmed working.
